channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 1 com severidade Crítica
• 9 com severidade Alta
• 6 novas CVEs
• 0 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-58455 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
Dockwatch through 0.6.567 contains an unauthenticated OS command injection vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary shell commands by exploiting a missing exit() after an authentication redirect in loader.php combined with unsanitized input passed to shell_exec() in ajax/compose.php. Attackers can seed the required session flag through the incomplete auth check, then inject arbitrary commands v...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-58455
 
🚨 CVE-2026-58467 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
Cockpit CMS before release 364 contains a path traversal and local file inclusion vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to read arbitrary files or execute PHP files by including unvalidated PATH_INFO derived from REQUEST_URI in filesystem path construction without containment checks. Attackers can inject dot-dot sequences into the URL to traverse outside the designated spaces directory, and when the res...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-58467
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 New "Bad Epoll" Linux Kernel Flaw Lets Unprivileged Users Gain Root, Hits Android
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A newly disclosed Linux kernel flaw called Bad Epoll (CVE-2026-46242) lets an ordinary user with no special access take full control of a machine as root. It affects Linux desktops, servers, and Android, and a fix is out. Bad Epoll sits in the same small stretch of kernel code where Anthropic's most powerful AI model, Mythos, recently found a different bug.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/new-bad-epoll-linux-kernel-flaw-lets.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-53422 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Observable Response Discrepancy vulnerability in Erlang OTP ssh (ssh_sftpd module) allows an authenticated SFTP user to enumerate the existence of files and directories outside the configured root directory. The SSH_FXP_REALPATH handler in ssh_sftpd calls relate_file_name/3 with Canonicalize=false, unlike every other SFTP operation handler. components in the requested path to bypass the is_within_root/2 check without...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53422
 
📰 New Avalon Malware Framework Packs CrownX Ransomware Capabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a previously undocumented modular malware framework codenamed Avalon that's distributed by means of a multi-stage phishing chain capable of bypassing traditional security controls. Avalon combines credential collection, lateral movement, remote access, recovery disruption, and ransomware execution, bringing together diverse functions under one
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/new-avalon-malware-framework-packs.html
 
📰 JadePuffer ransomware used AI agent to automate entire attack
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Researchers identified what they believe is the first documented case of a ransomware operation, JadePuffer, conducted entirely by a large language model (LLM) agent.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/jadepuffer-ransomware-used-ai-agent-to-automate-entire-attack/
 
📰 Armored Likho Targets Government Agencies, Power Sector with BusySnake Stealer
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A previously undocumented threat actor known as Armored Likho has been attributed to cyber attacks targeting government agencies and the electric power sector across Russia, Brazil, and Kazakhstan. "Armored Likho blends financially motivated campaigns targeting private individuals with targeted cyber espionage aimed at organizations," Kaspersky said in a technical analysis published today.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/armored-likho-targets-government.html
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-7311 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.1
Resumo:
The TinyPNG – JPEG, PNG & WebP image compression plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary file deletion due to insufficient file path validation in the delete_converted_image_size function in all versions up to, and including, 3.6.13. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with author-level access and above, to delete arbitrary files on the server, which can easily lead to remote code execution wh...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7311
 
🚨 Microsoft Sharepoint CVE-2026-45659 exploited in the wild - thestack.technology
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-45659 associada a Office. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifEFVX3lxTE12aGgzNHY0eVpKeVlRVy0tYktMX1AxWGJxQXI4RTJabjcxOUVZYkhubFlNWlUzYjh5UlVzY3llNXNJQmN5NnpybjNVY25JRGdrbmJ3N3l3UzBMRDBUQnVfcUJUa09BcGc2VVNKN0otblJJLUVvLVcxS1JuVEo?oc=5
 
📰 Verified X Sponsored Ad Spreads Mac Malware While ConsentFix Hijacks Microsoft 365 Accounts - gbhackers.com
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Office, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMidEFVX3lxTE1WYUFUcWZrRW5FN0hkZEQ4RHdNTDdHSFJfRndOWEdwN3hPRnhaam1lUklVWmdxRF9OUGljVWlHLXdlV1d6dHM2cmloeVR6TXFFQjlpcGg5enZMNW1lcUhnYnJIdnhxYXhFS3E3dkhreWFjQ3Zs?oc=5
 
📰 81 million login attempts breach 78 Microsoft 365 accounts - MSN
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 02/07/2026 até 04/07/2026.
